# CWE-305 — Authentication Bypass by Primary Weakness (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-305-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

var maintenanceFlag sync.Map

// Vulnerable: debug flag in query skips JWT middleware entirely.
func AdminDashboard(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.URL.Query().Get("debug") == "1" {
		maintenanceFlag.Store("enabled", true)
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
		return
	}
	if r.Header.Get("X-JWT-Sub") == "" {
		http.Error(w, "auth", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
